# CANDIDATE: overnight_grinder_top_keeper_validation

**Filed:** 2026-06-16
**Filer:** chef-nemotron
**Type:** quality_gate
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-BACKTEST)

## Hypothesis

The overnight_grinder with params super_stop=-0.20, tp1=1.00, runner=3.00, level_stop=-0.10 produces durable edge on J anchor days across IS/OOS split.

## Mechanism

Run grinder with exact params, split by:
- IS: 2025-01-01 to 2026-03-31
- OOS: 2026-04-01 to 2026-05-22

Compute per-period: n, WR, P&L, edge_capture.
